===================
===================
=== Bob Dylan - Osaka February 25th 1978 (Inc.)_Info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN - Osaka Fu, Japan, February 25th 1978 (Incomplete) (New Transfer from Tape, JTT)

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
A complete version of this concert is running here:

http://www.dimeadozen.org/torrents-details.php?id=349519

This is a possible different recording but I have been unable to compare.
Though many of the problems mentioned don't seem to be present
++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

Bob Dylan
Matsushita Denki Taiikukan
Hirakata City
Osaka Fu, Japan
February 25th 1978

Very Good Audience Recording

Missing first four numbers

Cassettes as received from GS in 1978 and not previously transferred to Disc or Traded by me

SOURCE: Master Cassettes > Cassettes (GS) > TDK C90/C60 > Akai GX95 MK11 >
Soundforge PRO 10b > FLAC Level 8 Align on Sector Boundaries

No Normalising or EQ

Disc One, Track 01 Fades In
Disc One, Track 12 Fraction at end Clipped
Disc Two, Track 01 Brief Fade In

Mastered to Digital & Artwork by JTT, 2011

Disc One
01. Love Minus Zero/No Limit
02. Ballad Of A Thin Man
03. Shelter From The Storm
04. Girl From The North Country
05. Maggie's Farm
06. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
07. To Ramona
08. Like A Rolling Stone
09. I Shall Be Released
10. Going, Going, Gone
< interval >
11. One Of Us Must Know (Sooner Or Later)
12. Blowin' In The Wind

Disc Two
01. Just Like A Woman
02. Oh, Sister
03. You're A Big Girl Now
04. All Along The Watchtower
05. I Want You
06. One Too Many Mornings
07. All I Really Want To Do
09. Tomorrow Is A Long Time
09. Knockin' On Heaven's Door
10. It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
11. Forever Young
12. The Times They Are A-Changin'

+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
PLEASE DO NOT CONVERT TO LOSSY FILES AND UPLOAD TO EXPECTING RAIN OR OTHER SITES
+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
